text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I happen across Eishin Flash, but she looks upset
for some reason.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
I was looking for a particular ingredient so I could
make a dish I often ate back home, but...
choice_data_list: Did they not have it in stock?
Did they not have it in stock?

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Caviar is very expensive in Japan... It is far
beyond what I could afford on my budget.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She's not wrong about the price, and I
unfortunately can't offer to buy it for her. Eishin
Flash trudges away desolately.
